text: Standing in this well-lit, geometric space, I feel a subtle blend of excitement and curiosity. The vivid blue light and glass walls draw my attention inward, while the purposeful signage about "R+D" on the colorful wall hints at innovation and collaboration. I am aware of my own presence as both observer and participant, surrounded by the artifacts of human curiosity. Here, the environment seems to invite questions about knowledge making and co-creation—an opportunity to reflect on the persistence of inquiry in shaping our collective future.
